quality.completeness: High. Contains name, type, rarity, attunement requirement, detailed description, and source information.
quality.readability: Excellent. The mechanics are clearly described.

unique_properties.effect: Changes the appearance of the armor to mimic normal clothing or other armor, retaining original bulk and weight. Effect is persistent until reapplied or armor is removed.

mechanics.power_level_justification: Rare seems appropriate for a permanent +1 AC bonus combined with a useful non-combat/social utility effect (glamour).
